focus: operator/API parity for options, defaults, exits, result fields, repair semantics, and absent-generation behavior

findingDetails.title: Operator options with missing values silently target defaults
findingDetails.evidence: A present --database without a value is replaced by the default path; malformed status returned success despite the invalid-input contract.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All options share optionValue; tests cover valued happy paths and a malformed status probe reproduced default selection.

claimAdjudication.claim: Missing option values and unknown flags are accepted and can select the default database.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Required corpus/generation/profile guards and 13/13 tests were checked; no generic missing-value or unknown-option validation exists.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Permissive parsing may be intentional and omission legitimately uses the default.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A governing contract permits unknown flags and proves valueless path options cannot reach mutations.

findingDetails.title: Status cannot report an uninitialized clean-checkout database root
findingDetails.evidence: readdir runs before pointer absence handling, so a missing parent throws ENOENT instead of published:false.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Absent-parent probe reproduced ENOENT; the test creates its fixture directory before status.

claimAdjudication.claim: Status throws internal ENOENT when the database root has never been created.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Existing empty directories return published:false; only absent-parent status fails.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Directory creation could be an undocumented precondition.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A governing contract requires pre-creation and bootstrap guarantees it before status.

traceabilityChecks.evidence: Missing values and unknown flags are not rejected.
Missing parent throws before unpublished DTO.
Reviewed result fields match README semantics.
Default is legacy and absent persistent generation fails closed.

noveltyJustification: Two new P1 defects add weight 10 to active total weight 40; stale-path findings were not duplicated.
edgeCases: Omitted --database is valid; present-but-valueless is malformed.
Existing empty directory returns unpublished; missing directory throws.
Initial search surfaced lineage-local review hits; no out-of-target code evidence was used.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Public operator/API parity spans commands, schemas, and lifecycle boundaries.

searchLedger.result: two defects; valid DTO parity clean

counterevidence: Specific required-value guards exist, but no generic missing-value or unknown-option validation exists.
referee: P1 retained because malformed state-changing input can silently select the default database.

counterevidence: Existing empty directories return published:false, but absent parent throws ENOENT.
referee: P1 retained because clean-checkout diagnostics fail before their modeled absence result.
